name: Update Agent
description: Updates an agent's configuration and/or state. Only 'config' and 'state' fields can be updated — framework-managed fields (status, tasks, inbox, timeline) are not affected. Use this to change the transition operation, system prompt, or any other agent configuration without recreating the agent.

config.description: New framework configuration (replaces existing config entirely)

state.description: New state for the transition function (replaces existing state entirely)
